title: [HWCleanup] Convert table lookup into case statement

features.name: priority_mux_chain_table_lookup
features.description: Code should include a chain of nested mux operations where each mux performs equality comparison (eq) on a key signal and selects between a value and the next mux in the chain, forming a priority-based table lookup pattern

features.name: priority_case_with_binary_literals
features.description: Code should include a priority case statement with binary literal case items representing key matches, with a register assignment in an always_comb block

features.name: mux_chain_to_case_transformation
features.description: Code should include both a priority mux chain pattern and its equivalent priority case statement representation, demonstrating the mux-chain-to-case transformation
